title: Dependencies Registry
description: Canonical shape for .ai-dev-kit/registries/dependencies.yaml -- one entry per declared dependency (runtime, dev, peer) with its current vulnerability list, cross-referenced vendor registry, and the paths that import it. Refreshed by scripts/sync-dependencies.ts (runs pnpm/npm audit --json + import scan). The pre-push gate check-dependencies.ts fails on CRITICAL or HIGH, warns on MEDIUM, or when last_audited_on is older than 14 days.

last_audited_on.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last sync-dependencies.ts run. Stale after 14 days; check-dependencies.ts fails the push to force a refresh.

name.description: Exact package name as declared in package.json.

vendor_registry.description: Relative path to the matching .ai-dev-kit/registries/<vendor>.json when the package name lines up with a known vendor (assemblyai -> .ai-dev-kit/registries/assemblyai.json). null when no match.

id.description: CVE-YYYY-NNNN, GHSA advisory id, or the ID reported by pnpm/npm audit.

patched_in.description: Semver range that resolves the advisory, or null when no patch is available yet.

used_by.description: Relative source paths that import this package (grep-based scan across lib/, app/, components/, src/).
